documentation.text:
@title BookEscrow
 @notice Trust-minimized escrow for "A Multiverse of Love" by Interstellar Psychology.
 Flow:
   1. Buyer approves this contract on the token, then calls createOrder().
      Funds split into cost (covers print+ship) and profit (refundable portion).
   2. Author calls fulfillOrder() with a shipping-proof hash → cost released immediately.
   3. Buyer has DISPUTE_WINDOW days after fulfillment to call claimProfitRefund().
      If they do nothing, anyone can call releaseProfit() after the window to pay the author.
   4. If the author never fulfills within FULFILLMENT_DEADLINE, buyer can emergencyRefund()
      to recover the full amount.

@notice Buyer calls this within DISPUTE_WINDOW days of fulfillment to get profit back.
         No approval from the author required — the contract just executes.

@notice After DISPUTE_WINDOW has elapsed without a refund claim, anyone can release
         the escrowed profit to the author.

@notice If the author hasn't fulfilled within FULFILLMENT_DEADLINE, buyer can
         withdraw the full amount (cost + profit) themselves.
